title: Pandas in Data Science Workflow
description: This flowchart illustrates the typical steps in using pandas for data manipulation and analysis.
relationships: Data Loading -> Data Cleaning (using read_csv, read_excel, etc.)
Data Cleaning -> Data Transformation (using dropna, fillna, replace, etc.)
Data Transformation -> Data Analysis (using groupby, pivot, merge, etc.)
Data Analysis -> Data Visualization (using plot method or integration with libraries)
